title: test(e2e): isolate independent production scenarios
body:
## Summary

- remove Playwright `serial` mode from nine production E2E suites whose scenarios can establish independent state
- refactor model-switching to use the test-scoped authenticated `page` fixture instead of one shared page
- start a fresh chat session before each worker-scoped chat scenario and make file-preview reopening generate its own file card
- keep assertions and product behavior unchanged; stateful lifecycle suites such as agent hire/fire remain serial

This prevents one real product failure from marking the rest of an unrelated suite as did-not-run, so the production report preserves the full failure inventory.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm exec playwright test --list --project=basic-usage --project=tool-misc --project=session-features --project=file-preview --project=chat-lifecycle --project=chat-streaming --project=chat-errors --project=error-recovery --project=model-switching` (38 tests collected)
- [x] `bash scripts/verify-local.sh --web-static ...` for all nine changed specs
- [ ] PR checks
- [ ] targeted production E2E after review/checks settle
